title: Noida、Uttar Pradesh — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Noida、Uttar Pradesh的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Noida是Uttar Pradesh的一個城市，人口約650,000。A planned satellite city of Delhi, a major IT and business hub with modern infrastructure, shopping malls, and residential complexes.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
